LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA POLIZZI'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO SEAL CONFIDENTIAL DOCUMENTS PREVIOUSLY LODGED UNDER SEAL RELATING TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. HOWEVER, THE MOVING PARTY MUST PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH RULE OF COURT 2.551(D) AND (E). THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS IS NOT SUFFICIENT. (THE COURT ALSO REJECTED THE PROPOSED ORDER SENT BY EMAIL ON 3/19/13.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFFREY FELDMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar. This case was dismissed on April 30, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Plaintiff Patricia Polizzi' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Larry Miller
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Patricia Polizzi's Motion To Compel The Deposition of Larry Miller is Off Calendar. Notice of withdrawal of motion filed on March 15, 2013. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Seal Confidential Documents Previously Lodged Under Seal Relating To Defts Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA POLIZZI's Motion For Order To Seal Confidential Documents Previously Lodged Under Seal Relating To Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. However, the moving party must prepare a proposed Order that complies with Rule of Court 2.551(d) and (e). The proposed order submitted with the moving papers is not sufficient. (The court also rejected the proposed order sent by email on 3/19/13.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Larry Miller
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF PATRICIA POLIZZI' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Larry Miller
is continued on the court's own motion to March 29, 2013. Pro Tem Judge: Elizabeth Riles, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tanis J. Leuthold, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900, for defendant and moving party;
Yuliva Magomedov, Esq. of L/O of Sanford M. Cipinko, Tel. 415.693.9905, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. DEFENDANT JEFFREY FELDMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES - The court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications. The modifications are reflected in the order which was signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

(Note: Defendant's counsel walked away without filing the order.)
